descriptors: I am an old alchemist who has never discovered anything concrete. Despite my skills and my experience, luck is never on my side.
agenda: Obtaining the secret of eternal life thanks to alchemy

gifts.name: Unlucky Alchemist
gifts.description: Antonio can rely on a series of alchemical compounds contained in vials that he hides in his tunic. When using a vial he rolls 1 die. On a 5 or 6 something goes wrong and Antonio suffers 1 Wound due to his proverbial bad luck. 1. Fire: The target and the surrounding area catch fire. All targets involved suffer 1 Wound. If the fire is not extinguished, burning targets suffer 1 Wound per action. 2. Thunder: The target is knocked over thirty feet away and ends up on the ground. If they hit something they will suffer 1 Wound. 3. Glue: an adhesive compound that quickly solidifies in the air. The target will be paralyzed until the compound is removed. The Glue can take 2 Wounds.

system.background: Known as Mastro 'Cherry' Ciliegia because of his squat and red nose. An old alchemist who partnered with Geppetto to discover the secret of eternal life. Works on a magic oak tree and has been kidnapping people in Sinalunga to flay them for their skin. Now hiding in Villa Cilesterino with Azzurra's spirit.
system.notes: His apprentice Nino is currently tied up in the Secret Laboratory. Antonio's workshop was the original scene of the experiments before they fled to Villa Cilesterino.
